auth.roleClientDesc: Post projects and find the perfect AI developer
auth.roleDeveloperDesc: Showcase your skills and get matched with projects
auth.errorGeneric: Something went wrong, please try again

landing.heroSubtitle: The high-performance marketplace for neural architecture, LLM fine-tuning, and computer vision deployment. Built by engineers, for the next frontier.
landing.featuresDesc: Our marketplace specializes in high-density technical fields where generalist platforms fail to provide the necessary depth.
landing.featureAiDesc: Our AI understands your project requirements and matches you with the most suitable developers based on skills, experience, and availability.
landing.featureMatchDesc: Every developer is AI-reviewed and verified. Browse profiles, ratings, and portfolios to find the perfect match for your project.
landing.featureSecureDesc: Escrow-protected payments via Stripe. Funds are held safely until you approve the delivery. No risk, no hassle.
landing.catLlmDesc: Specialized expertise in LoRA, QLoRA, and RLHF for domain-specific language model optimization.
landing.catCvDesc: Real-time object detection, segmentation models, and edge-device visual processing.
landing.catNeuralDesc: Custom transformer design, CNN optimization, and novel research implementation.
landing.catDeployDesc: Scale models with Kubernetes, Triton Inference Server, and ONNX runtime optimizations.
landing.velocityDesc: We've removed the friction from high-stakes AI procurement. From scoping to deployment in four precision steps.
landing.velStep1Desc: Define compute requirements, model constraints, and performance benchmarks.
landing.velStep2Desc: Matched with verified developers who have proven specialized repos.
landing.velStep3Desc: Collaborate in our IDE with pre-configured GPU stacks and secure data pipelines.
landing.velStep4Desc: Verified code hand-off or direct container deployment to your infrastructure.
landing.recruitDesc: Join the world's most sophisticated network of researchers and engineers. High-impact contributions for elite teams.
landing.step1Desc: Chat with our AI assistant or post manually. The AI helps you clarify requirements and estimate budgets.
landing.step2Desc: Our matching engine finds the best developers for your project based on skills, rates, and availability.
landing.step3Desc: AI generates a contract. Both parties sign online. Payment is held in secure escrow via Stripe.
landing.step4Desc: Developer delivers the work. Review, request revisions, or accept. Payment is released automatically on approval.
